name: Buttermilk Fruit Sherbet
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Frozen unsweetened blueberries or other berries
Optional: honey or low-calorie sweetener to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine frozen berries with half the buttermilk (1/4 cup) in a food processor.
2. Process until the berries are coarsely chopped.
3. Stir with a spoon and cover.
4. Continue processing, adding remaining buttermilk a little at a time through the cover opening.
5. Uncover, redistribute berries, then re-cover and process again until the mixture is smooth and has the texture of frozen custard or soft-serve ice cream.
6. Do not overprocess.
7. If desired, sweeten to taste with a few drops of honey or a few packets of low-calorie sweetener.
8. Serve immediately.
Yield: Makes 4 servings, approximately 75 calories each; sweetener adds about 5 calories per serving.
